markets.question: Spread: Hamarkameratene (-2.5)
markets.description:
In the upcoming Norway Eliteserien game, scheduled for April 6 at 11:00 AM ET:

This market will resolve to "Hamarkameratene" if Hamarkameratene win the game by 3 or more goals.

Otherwise, this market will resolve to "SK Brann".

If the game is postponed, this market will remain open until the game has been completed. If the game is canceled entirely, with no make-up game, this market will resolve 50–50.

This market will resolve according to the official final score published on eliteserien.no. This market refers only to the outcome within the first 90 minutes of regular play plus stoppage time.

The primary resolution source for this market is the official statistics of the event as recognized by the governing body or event organizers. However, if the governing body or event organizers have not published final match statistics within 2 hours after the event's conclusion, a consensus of credible reporting may be used instead.

events.title: Hamarkameratene vs. SK Brann - More Markets
events.description: More markets for the Norway Eliteserien game, scheduled for April 6 at 11:00 AM ET.

markets.question: Cuiabá EC vs. Ceará SC: O/U 4.5
markets.description:
In the upcoming Brazil Serie B game between Cuiabá EC and Ceará SC, scheduled for April 4 at 5:00 PM ET:

This market will resolve to "Over" if Cuiabá EC and Ceará SC combine to score 5 or more goals in this game.

If the combined total is less than 5, this market will resolve to "Under".

If the game is postponed, this market will remain open until the game has been completed. If the game is canceled entirely, with no make-up game, this market will resolve 50–50.

If the game is started but not completed, this market will resolve according to the official final score published on cbf.com.br. This market refers only to the outcome within the first 90 minutes of regular play plus stoppage time.

The primary resolution source for this market is the official statistics of the event as recognized by the governing body or event organizers. However, if the governing body or event organizers have not published final match statistics within 2 hours after the event's conclusion, a consensus of credible reporting may be used instead.

markets.question: V-Varen Nagasaki vs. Shimizu S-Pulse: Both Teams to Score
markets.description:
In the upcoming J1 100 Year Vision League game between V-Varen Nagasaki and Shimizu S-Pulse, scheduled for April 5 at 12:00 AM ET:

This market will resolve to "Yes" if both V-Varen Nagasaki and Shimizu S-Pulse each score at least one goal during the game.

This market will resolve to "No" if either team fails to score (i.e., if one or both teams finish with zero goals).

If the game is postponed, this market will remain open until the game has been completed. If the game is canceled entirely, with no make-up game, this market will resolve 50–50.

If the game is started but not completed, this market will resolve according to the official final score published on jleague.jp. This market refers only to the outcome within the first 90 minutes of regular play plus stoppage time.

The primary resolution source for this market is the official statistics of the event as recognized by the governing body or event organizers. However, if the governing body or event organizers have not published final match statistics within 2 hours after the event's conclusion, a consensus of credible reporting may be used instead.
